name: vLLM on AMD ROCm
description: AccelMark runner for AMD GPUs (MI250X, MI300X) using vLLM on the ROCm backend. Enables direct apples-to-apples comparison between AMD and NVIDIA on the same benchmark suites.
notes: FP8 excluded from SUPPORTED_QUANTIZATIONS for broad MI-series compatibility. MI300X users wanting FP8 can subclass AMDVLLMROCmRunner and add 'fp8' to SUPPORTED_QUANTIZATIONS. torch.cuda.* APIs work unchanged on ROCm via HIP aliasing.
